changes.summary: May 2026 monthly closing: aggregate $712.6M agreed across Class I/D/N/S Common Shares (priced at April 30, 2026 NAV - pending). As of April 30, 2026 outstanding: 129,940,620 Class I + 20,810 Class D + 8,524,981 Class S; no Class N.

Item 2.03/8.01: On April 28, 2026, Ares acquired BCP Renaissance Parent LLC and BCP Renaissance LLC indirect subs in connection with portfolio investment. Rover Credit Agreement: senior secured Term Loan B, ~$1.09B outstanding (Mar 31, 2026), SOFR+2.25% floor 1.00%, matures Oct 31, 2031. $750M interest rate swap with Morgan Stanley fixed at 3.7566% (terminates Jun 30, 2026). Non-recourse to Fund.

SC TO-I/A Final Amendment: Q1 2026 tender offer (5% cap) expired Mar 25, 2026. 2,454,016.88 Shares tendered at NAV per Share as of Mar 31, 2026 valuation date. Aggregate NAV of tendered shares ~$27,022,326.82; Fund paid ~$26,985,176.25 on Apr 29, 2026 (net of 2% Early Withdrawal Fees). 100% of tendered shares accepted under Rule 13e-4(f)(1).

424B3 SAI Supplement: Keith Kleinman resigned as Secretary; Board appointed Mary Kate Leonard (Senior Legal Counsel at Hamilton Lane Advisors; previously Chief Capital Officer at Bel Canto Asset Growth Fund and SVP at Blackstone) as new Secretary effective immediately.
